terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.s1Body: La Petite Bouteille is an e-commerce platform specialising in the sale of premium wines and spirits in Cameroon. By accessing our site and using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms of use.
terms.s2AgeBody: You must be at least 18 to use our site and purchase our products. By placing an order, you certify that you are of legal age to buy alcoholic beverages in Cameroon.
terms.s2AccountBody: Creating an account requires accurate and up-to-date information. You are responsible for the confidentiality of your login credentials.
terms.s3ProcessBody: An order is only confirmed after payment validation or acceptance of cash-on-delivery.
terms.s3PriceBody: All prices are shown in CFA Francs (FCFA) and include applicable taxes.
terms.s4ZonesBody: We currently deliver to Yaoundé, Douala, and other major Cameroon cities.
terms.s4TimeBody: Express delivery within 24h for Yaoundé and Douala. Variable times for other cities.
terms.s4FeesBody: Free delivery for orders above 50,000 FCFA.
terms.s5Intro: Our referral program allows users to earn commissions on sales generated by their network.
terms.s5Withdraw: Withdrawals are available via MTN Money and Orange Money, with a 5,000 FCFA minimum.
terms.s6Body: All content on this site (texts, images, logos, trademarks) is protected by intellectual property law. Any unauthorized reproduction or use is strictly prohibited.
terms.s7Body: La Petite Bouteille cannot be held responsible for direct or indirect damages resulting from the use of this site or the inability to use it. We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time.
terms.s8Intro: For any question regarding these terms, you can contact us:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Body: La Petite Bouteille is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your personal information when you use our site and services.
privacy.s2I1Body: first name, last name, email, phone number, date of birth
privacy.s2I3Body: Mobile Money phone number (we do not store payment details)
privacy.s3L2: Manage your account and personal area
privacy.s3L3: Send order confirmations and delivery updates
privacy.s3L4: Manage the ambassador program and calculate commissions
privacy.s3L5: Improve our services and personalise your experience
privacy.s3L6: Inform you of our offers and promotions (with your consent)
privacy.s3L7: Comply with our legal obligations, including age verification
privacy.s4L2: Secure storage with sensitive data encryption
privacy.s5Intro: We never sell your personal data. Your information may be shared only with:
privacy.s5L1Body: to ensure delivery of your orders
privacy.s5L2Body: MTN and Orange for Mobile Money transactions
privacy.s6Outro: You can disable cookies in your browser settings, but some site features may no longer function properly.
privacy.s7Intro: You have the following rights regarding your data:
privacy.s7L1Body: obtain a copy of your personal data
privacy.s7L3Body: request the deletion of your data
privacy.s7L4Body: object to the processing of your data
privacy.s7L5Body: receive your data in a structured format
privacy.s7Outro: To exercise these rights, contact us at: privacy@lapetitebouteille.com
privacy.s8Intro: We retain your personal data for:
privacy.s8L1: The lifetime of your user account
privacy.s8L2: 5 years after your last order (legal obligations)
privacy.s8L3: 3 years for browsing data and statistics
privacy.s9Body: We reserve the right to modify this privacy policy at any time. Any change will be published on this page with a new update date. We encourage you to regularly review this page.
privacy.s10Intro: For any question regarding this privacy policy:
